items.name_en: M24436 Fluorescent Yellow - This Speedy Bandoulière 25 Monogram Leather handbag features soft calfskin, recreating the refined look of the canvas print with the Monogram pattern. Shiny metal hardware, lambskin lining, and a plaque together attest to Creative Director Pharrell Williams' relentless pursuit of details. 25 x 15 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M24575 Blue, M24120 Pink, M24563 Yellow, Original Leather, Dynamic Code Change. This Capucines Mini Bag features Taurillon leather and lustrous metal hardware, with a petite Capucines Cutie decoration crafted from the same materials and design, secured to the strap with a Monogram flower hook. A playful design that effortlessly brightens any look. 21.0 x 14.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
M24611 M24990
This Low Key Shoulder Bag handbag reaffirms the brand's exquisite craftsmanship with a magnificent design. Soft calfskin is dyed in a calm tone, while an adjustable shoulder strap and suede lining create a sophisticated atmosphere. The classic LV lock ensures your belongings are safe.
26 x 18 x 7 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M24675 Black. The Noé BB bag belongs to the Nautical Capsule series, crafted from soft and durable Epi leather. The refined design combines iconic materials with a embossed wave pattern, featuring smooth calfskin for the base and strap. A practical removable clutch is included inside with accessories. Dimensions: 20×20×15cm

items.name_en: M24905 White
items.name_cn:
M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag
This spacious Neverfull MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, featuring colorful Monogram Blossoms. Sixty-six colorful threads, in subtle gradient colors, are interwoven to create a jacquard pattern. Connected to the long shoulder strap is a sculpted mirror charm. It features a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

specs.rawTitle:
M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag
This spacious Neverfull MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, featuring colorful Monogram Blossoms. Sixty-six colorful threads, in subtle gradient colors, are interwoven to create a jacquard pattern. Connected to the long shoulder strap is a sculpted mirror charm. It features a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

items.name_en: M25046 Patent Silver Clasp
items.name_cn:
M25046 Patent Silver Clasp
This Go-14 Malletage Medium bag from the 2024 Spring/Summer show is infused with a glossy patent leather body for a striking look. The quilted lambskin interprets the brand's classic Malletage pattern, while the polished LV Twist lock adds a refined touch. The chain and leather handles are both detachable, offering multiple styling possibilities.
23 x 16 x 10 cm
(L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
M25413 Black Leather
This CarryAll Dark medium bag features a soft calfskin in a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a standout look to 2024 SS runway styles. Polished metal hardware contrasts with a soft, tactile grained finish. Spacious enough for daily essentials, it's a perfect travel companion.
